section_summaries.heading: Axis labels and units
section_summaries.summary: - There are **no visible y-axis labels or units**. - The x-axis shows quarter labels at the bottom left: `Q1 Q2 Q3 Q4` - No axis title is visible.

section_summaries.heading: Data series
section_summaries.summary: - There is **one series** (no legend shown), represented by a **blue line**. - The chart appears to track a KPI over **four quarters**.

section_summaries.heading: Main trend / comparison
section_summaries.summary: - The KPI fluctuates over time: it starts low, climbs to an early peak, dips in the middle, then reaches a higher peak near Q4 before easing down slightly. - Overall, the line ends **higher than it started**, indicating upward progress despite a mid-period dip.

Data series: - There is **one series** (no legend shown), represented by a **blue line**. - The chart appears to track a KPI over **four quarters**. Main trend / comparison: - The KPI fluctuates over time: it starts low, climbs to an early peak, dips in the middle, then reaches a higher peak near Q4 before easing down slightly. - Overall, the line ends **higher than it started**, indicating upward progress despite a mid-period dip.
